calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Hardisty for Petitioners.

The Court stated that the concern is that the Administrators distributed $100,000.00 to themselves without a Court order. Ms. Hardisty stated that she was very appalled when she found out they had done this, that she was out of the Country when this happened and that she explained to them that they should not have done this. Ms. Hardisty also stated that the money had already been spent for their medical bills, that her Clients are elderly, that there are no creditors, that the accounts were opened out of escrow and that when they received the money, they felt they were entitled to do that. The Court granted the First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. (subject to review of the order), but the Court is not going to approve the actions of the Personal Representatives.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julie Hardisty for Petitioners.

The Court informed Counsel that her Clients need to obtain special letters of administration to see if the original will is in the safe deposit box. Ms. Hardisty stated that both of her Clients are elderly, that the Client in California is not on the safe deposit box, that the other Client who is on the safe deposit box is out of State, and that the Decedent was very conscientious and provided a copy of the will to both of his siblings. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to April 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on obtaining of special letters.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
